name: Pawn Shops by Alberts Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Pawn Shops by Alberts Jewelry & Loan offers collateral-based lending and jewelry/gold buying at their Long Beach location, operating Monday-Saturday with extended hours.
description_long:
Pawn Shops by Alberts Jewelry & Loan operates a traditional pawn shop model in Long Beach, California, serving the local community as a source of quick cash through collateral-based transactions. The business is located at 1032 Long Beach Blvd and maintains consistent operating hours throughout the week, positioning itself as an accessible option for consumers needing immediate liquidity. Based on the company name and category classification, they specialize in pawn lending where customers pledge personal items—particularly jewelry and gold—as collateral in exchange for loans. The business maintains an active online presence through OfferUp, suggesting they engage with digital marketplaces for inventory and customer outreach.

The company offers core pawn shop services including collateral-based loans secured by jewelry, gold, and other personal valuables, along with direct purchasing of gold and jewelry items. Their model allows customers to retrieve pawned items within a specified period by repaying the loan plus agreed-upon interest and fees, or the shop retains the collateral. They appear to focus on jewelry and precious metals as primary inventory categories, which is common in established pawn operations.

Alberts Jewelry & Loan differentiates itself through longevity and community presence in Long Beach, with phone-accessible customer service at (562) 436-5656. Their consistent Monday-Saturday scheduling demonstrates reliability and accessibility to working consumers. The OfferUp marketplace presence suggests they actively buy and sell inventory online, expanding reach beyond the physical storefront.

Pawn shops provide genuine value for consumers needing emergency cash without credit checks or income verification, but borrowers should understand that pawn loans carry implicit high costs when annualized, and collateral loss is a real risk if loans aren't repaid. No specific interest rates, maximum loan amounts, or detailed service terms are publicly available through the provided website content. As with all pawn transactions, customers must carefully evaluate whether the cost of short-term liquidity justifies the risk of losing valued possessions.
address: 1032 Long Beach Blvd, Long Beach, CA 90813

company_info.headquarters: 1032 Long Beach Blvd, Long Beach, CA 90813

pros: No credit check required—accessible to consumers with poor or no credit history
Immediate cash availability—no lengthy application or approval process
Consistent Monday-Saturday operating hours (10:00 AM - 5:30 PM) for accessibility
Direct phone contact available at (562) 436-5656 for inquiries
Jewelry and gold buying service provides alternative exit for unwanted items
Physical storefront location in Long Beach with established local presence
Online marketplace presence via OfferUp suggests competitive pricing and inventory
cons: Loan costs are high when annualized—pawn loans typically carry 200%+ APR equivalent when calculated annually
Risk of collateral loss if loan is not repaid by deadline
No information provided about interest rates, fees, or loan terms on accessible websites
Limited transparency regarding maximum loan amounts or valuation methodology for jewelry/gold
Pawn lending may encourage short-term financial decisions rather than addressing underlying cash flow issues
best_for: Consumers with urgent short-term cash needs and no access to traditional credit
People needing quick loans without credit inquiries or income verification
Individuals looking to sell unwanted jewelry or gold items for immediate cash
Those with valuable collateral (jewelry, gold, electronics) willing to pledge items for temporary loans
diagnosis: Pawn Shops by Alberts Jewelry & Loan is best for consumers facing genuine financial emergencies who have valuable collateral and cannot access traditional credit, understanding that pawn loans are expensive when annualized and carry real risk of collateral loss. The primary caveat is that while pawn loans provide fast cash without credit checks, they should be used as a last resort for short-term needs rather than a regular financing strategy, due to high implicit costs and the psychological/financial impact of losing pledged items.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans secured by jewelry and gold
Gold buying and direct precious metals purchasing
Personal item pawning and collateral lending
Loan redemption services for retrieving pawned items
Inventory sales of pawned and purchased items
Online marketplace sales via OfferUp platform
